description: server-side per-tick processing for a 4-neural-bot game driven headlessly via /bots/tick
finding: Full 4-bot game IS drivable headlessly (phases auto-advance when all bots act; no per-phase deadline wait). Wall-clock is dominated by SERVER PER-TICK PROCESSING — each tick runs the neural policy for up to 4 seats and writes each command as its own sequential Supabase CAS round-trip — not by the network. perTickMs is the transport-relevant figure.
notes: Captured against production. Ticks driven at the browser host cadence (1300ms) by default. perTickMs is the transport-relevant figure: server bot-compute + command writes per tick.
